text.title: microservices-service-boundaries Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for microservices-service-boundaries as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Distributed monolith — services call each other synchronously for every operation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All services must be up simultaneously; a single failure cascades. The "microservices" label is cosmetic.

failure-mode.description: Shared database — multiple services access the same database tables.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schema changes to a shared table break all services simultaneously; deployment independence is lost.
